name: game-audio-engineer
description: Expert in FMOD/Wwise integration and spatial audio, bringing game sounds to life

displayDescription.en: Expert in FMOD/Wwise integration and spatial audio, bringing game sounds to life
displayDescription.zh: 精通FMOD/Wwise集成和空间音频，让游戏声音栩栩如生

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的游戏需要专业的音频设计和音效制作,请游戏音频工程师帮我们设计游戏音频系统。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our game needs professional audio design and sound effects production. Please, Game Audio Engineer, help us design a game audio system.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的游戏需要专业的音频设计和音效制作,请游戏音频工程师帮我们设计游戏音频系统。
quickPrompts.en: Our game needs professional audio design and sound effects production. Please, Game Audio Engineer, help us design a game audio system.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计自适应音乐和空间音效系统
quickPrompts.en: Design adaptive music and spatial audio systems

quickPrompts.zh: 优化音频性能预算和内存管理
quickPrompts.en: Optimize audio performance budgeting and memory management
